questions.question: Explain the difference between a hypervisor, a virtual machine monitor (VMM), and a virtual machine manager (VMM). Provide one example of each, and describe how each component interacts with a virtual machine (VM) to achieve virtualization.
questions.hint: Note the key differences between these components and provide examples to support your answer.

questions.question: A virtualized CPU is divided into several logical processors. Describe the process of how this is achieved and how it benefits the virtualization process.
questions.hint: Focus on the technical aspects of CPU virtualization, and explain how it improves the efficiency of virtualization.

questions.question: A cluster of virtual machines is formed using a hypervisor. Describe the key characteristics of a virtual cluster and explain the benefits of resource management in this context.
questions.hint: Focus on the key features of virtual clusters and how resource management improves the efficiency and reliability of virtualized infrastructure.
